summary: Track .twining state in git as project knowledge, exclude models/ cache
context: Twining coordination state (55 decisions, 189 graph entities, archived blackboard) represents accumulated project architectural knowledge that should persist across clones and collaborators. Previously gitignored as local-only state.
rationale: Decisions record why architectural choices were made with rejected alternatives — this is project knowledge, not personal state. The knowledge graph maps component relationships. The models/ directory (87MB embedding model cache) is excluded via .twining/.gitignore since it's a downloaded artifact that regenerates automatically.

alternatives.reason_rejected: Loses accumulated decision history and knowledge graph on every fresh clone — new sessions start without project context
